Container.Name: plexpulse-app
Container.Overview: PlexPulse - custom media discovery and request app. This image is NOT pulled from a registry; it must be built locally first. SSH into your server, clone the repo, and run: docker build -t plexpulse-app:latest . from inside the project folder before starting this container. See SETUP.md in the repo for full details on every variable below and important gotchas (build-time vs runtime variables, the Force Update requirement after rebuilding, etc).
Container.Requires: plexpulse-redis must be running first, and its host port must match the REDIS_URL variable below.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access PlexPulse's web interface

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database

Config.Name: TMDB_API_KEY
Config.Description: API key from themoviedb.org account settings

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: Leave as default - matches the App Data volume mount above

Config.Name: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
Config.Description: The full URL used to access PlexPulse. IMPORTANT: this must be correct at BUILD time, not just runtime - see SETUP.md

Config.Name: SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: Random secret string used to sign session cookies

Config.Name: NEXT_PUBLIC_PLEX_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Identifier used for Plex PIN OAuth login (browser-side). IMPORTANT: this must be correct at BUILD time, not just runtime - see SETUP.md

Config.Name: PLEX_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Same identifier as above, used server-side. Must match NEXT_PUBLIC_PLEX_CLIENT_ID exactly.

Config.Name: PLEX_SERVER_URL
Config.Description: Your Plex Media Server address, e.g. http://10.0.0.X:32400

Config.Name: PLEX_SERVER_TOKEN
Config.Description: Plex Media Server's own access token (see SETUP.md for how to find this)

Config.Name: REDIS_URL
Config.Description: e.g. redis://10.0.0.X:6380 - point at the plexpulse-redis container's host IP and port

Config.Name: IS_HTTPS
Config.Description: Set to true only if accessing PlexPulse over HTTPS (e.g. via Cloudflare Tunnel)

Config.Name: RADARR_1_URL
Config.Description: Radarr instance base URL, e.g. http://10.0.0.X:7878

Config.Name: RADARR_1_API_KEY
Config.Description: Found in Radarr: Settings -> General -> Security -> API Key

Config.Name: RADARR_2_URL
Config.Description: Optional second Radarr instance

Config.Name: RADARR_3_URL
Config.Description: Optional third Radarr instance

Config.Name: SONARR_1_URL
Config.Description: Sonarr instance base URL, e.g. http://10.0.0.X:8989

Config.Name: SONARR_1_API_KEY
Config.Description: Found in Sonarr: Settings -> General -> Security -> API Key

Config.Name: SONARR_2_URL
Config.Description: Optional second Sonarr instance

Config.Name: SONARR_3_URL
Config.Description: Optional third Sonarr instance
